Named CLI middleware attaches in declaration order to the root, groups, and
commands through middleware= chains.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import (
	"fmt"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
)

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=audit
func Audit(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler {
	return func(ctx cli.Context) error {
		fmt.Fprintln(ctx.Stdout(), "audit")
		return next(ctx)
	}
}

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=confirm
func Confirm(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler {
	return func(ctx cli.Context) error {
		fmt.Fprintln(ctx.Stdout(), "confirm")
		return next(ctx)
	}
}

//fabrik:cli:middleware name=retry
func Retry(next cli.Handler) cli.Handler {
	return next
}

//fabrik:cli:root middleware=audit
var _root struct{}

//fabrik:cli:group name=database middleware=confirm,retry
var _database struct{}

// Apply pending migrations.
//
//fabrik:cli:command path="database migrate" middleware=retry
func Migrate(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name: "app",
		Use:  []cli.Middleware{shared.Audit},
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name: "database",
				Use:  []cli.Middleware{shared.Confirm, shared.Retry},
				Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
					{
						Name: "migrate",
						Help: "Apply pending migrations",
						Use:  []cli.Middleware{shared.Retry},
						Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
							return shared.Migrate(ctx)
						},
					},
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}
